title: Communauté d'agglomération du Bocage Bressuirais
summary: Communauté d'agglomération du Bocage Bressuirais is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the town of Bressuire. It is located in the Deux-Sèvres department, in the Nouvelle-Aquitaine region, western France. Created in 2014, its seat is in Bressuire. Its area is 1318.8 km2. Its population was 73,944 in 2019, of which 19,850 in Bressuire proper.
text:
Communauté d'agglomération du Bocage Bressuirais is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the town of Bressuire. It is located in the Deux-Sèvres department, in the Nouvelle-Aquitaine region, western France. Created in 2014, its seat is in Bressuire. Its area is 1318.8 km2. Its population was 73,944 in 2019, of which 19,850 in Bressuire proper.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 33 communes:
